\documentclass{article}
\newif\ifanswers\answersfalse
\begin{document}
\begin{enumerate}

% name: CIA — confidentiality
% rubric: Correct = (a). 2 pts all-or-nothing.
\item \textit{(2 pts)}~Copying a file violates which property?
  \begin{enumerate}[label=(\alph*)]
    \item \correctchoice{Confidentiality}
    \item \wrongchoice{Integrity}
  \end{enumerate}
  \ifanswers \textcolor{keyred}{\textbf{Answer:} a} \fi

% name: Insider attack
\item \textit{(2 pts)}~\textsc{T~/~F.}~An insider can exceed their access.
  \ifanswers \textcolor{keyred}{\textbf{Answer:} True} \fi

% name: Code — CTR fixed nonce
% rubric: False; reused nonce reuses keystream. 2 pts.
\item \textit{(2 pts)}~\textsc{Code.}~True or False?
\begin{lstlisting}
nonce = b"\x00"*8
\end{lstlisting}
  \ifanswers \textcolor{keyred}{\textbf{Answer:} False --- reused nonce} \fi

% name: FIB — Shannon goals
% rubric: 1 pt per blank.
\item \textit{(2 pts)}~\textsc{Fill in the blank.}~Goals: \rule[-2pt]{3cm}{0.4pt} and \rule[-2pt]{3cm}{0.4pt}.
  \ifanswers \textcolor{keyred}{\textbf{Answer:} confusion; diffusion} \fi

\end{enumerate}
\end{document}
